groups._note: Gated extension fragment (V2 flag 7 / B56 wardrobe_intimate): appends intimate options to the bundled 'outfit' group. Options only - no scalar overrides (gated files load after every ungated directory). Structurally absent when content.gate_open is false. 5.7 UI pass: class 'intimate' buckets these under their own grouped-picker subsection.
